sql.query: SELECT wt.id,wt.templateName,wt.templateKey,wt.description,wt.versionNumber,wt.status,wt.isDefault,wt.createdDate,wt.modifiedDate,CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS UNSIGNED) AS stageCount,CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT tt.id) AS UNSIGNED) AS taskCount FROM tbl_workflow_templates wt LEFT JOIN tbl_template_stages s ON s.templateId=wt.id AND s.tenantId=wt.tenantId AND s.status<>'archived' LEFT JOIN tbl_template_tasks tt ON tt.templateId=wt.id AND tt.tenantId=wt.tenantId AND tt.status<>'archived' WHERE wt.tenantId=:tenantId GROUP BY wt.id ORDER BY wt.templateName
